input: user-course interaction graph (bipartite graph) with additional user-user and course-course relations via hypergraph
output: ranked list of courses per user
backbone: hybrid graph convolution network (fusion graph + hypergraph) with layer dropout
loss: BPR loss + differential contrastive loss (adjusted by prior similarity)
key_idea: use layer dropout to generate contrastive views and incorporate prior similarity to differentiate contrastive learning for graph nodes
